title: dracocephalum coerulescens
intro: Dracocephalum coerulescens, also known as blue dragon or Chinese dragonhead, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dracocephalum coerulescens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
